# Copied

> Fast menu-bar clipboard manager for macOS — every copy you make (text, images, code, links, files) is saved, searchable, and restorable. Optional iCloud Sync keeps history in sync across all your Macs.

Copied is published by Magneton Labs, LLC. It ships in three variants from the same codebase:

- **Mac App Store** (paid) — one-time $4.99 in-app purchase unlocks iCloud Sync.
- **Direct download** (paid) — Developer ID-signed notarized PKG; iCloud Sync unlocked via Stripe Checkout that returns a signed Ed25519 license JWT, stored in Keychain.
- **OSS** (local-only) — fully unlocked, for personal use; built locally from source, not redistributed.

Local clipboard history is always free. iCloud Sync is the paid unlock.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.getcopied.app/): feature overview + download.
- [Support](https://www.getcopied.app/support): FAQ covering getting started, keyboard shortcuts, iCloud Sync setup and troubleshooting, privacy, uninstall.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.getcopied.app/privacy): what we collect (nothing unless you enable iCloud Sync; then only your clipboard in your private CloudKit container), what we don't (no analytics, no trackers, no third parties beyond Apple + Stripe + EmailJS for license delivery).
- [Terms of Use](https://www.getcopied.app/terms): license grants (3-Mac limit per paid license), acceptable use, refund policy (14-day via Stripe, Apple's policy for App Store), no-warranty and liability clauses, Delaware governing law.
- [Buy (Stripe Checkout)](https://www.getcopied.app/buy?app=mac): one-time $4.99 iCloud Sync unlock for the direct-download variant.
- [GitHub release](https://github.com/MagnetonIO/copied-app/releases/latest): direct-download PKG.

## Key capabilities

- Fast menu bar popover with keyboard-first navigation (⌃⇧C global hotkey).
- Full-text fuzzy search across text, rich text, HTML, URLs, and extracted image text.
- Smart content detection: code, URLs, images, files, videos.
- Rich Copy As — write the exact pasteboard types your target app expects.
- `copied://` URL scheme for automation.
- Automatic tracking-parameter stripping on copied URLs.
- Favorites, trash, custom lists, excluded apps.
- Optional iCloud Sync via private CloudKit container (paid; 3 Macs per license).
- Local-only by default — no telemetry, no analytics, no data leaves your device unless Sync is on.

## Requirements

- macOS 15.0 (Sequoia) or later
- Apple Silicon or Intel
- For iCloud Sync: active iCloud account with iCloud Drive enabled

## Contact

- Support: support@getcopied.app
- Publisher: Magneton Labs, LLC, United States
